name: Apple or Pear Cake Turned Upside Down
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and 300g sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift flour into the mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Grease a base (preferably a cast iron pan) and place in preheated oven set to 180°C.
5. Bake for 20-30 minutes, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Peel and core apples or pears, then slice them.
7. Arrange slices over the base of the cake.
8. Sprinkle sugar over the fruit.
9. Return the cake to the oven and bake until the fruit is soft and golden brown.
10. To serve, place a plate over the baking pan and gently tip it upside down.
